articles.title: Mutual funds cut cash allocation by over Rs 4,500 crore in June to 19-month low
articles.description: Mutual funds cut cash holdings by over Rs 4,563 crore to Rs 1.83 lakh crore in June, marking a 19-month low, as fund houses increased equity exposure amid a market rally. The move came as geopolitical tensions eased and crude oil prices declined. The Sensex and Nifty50 gained 2.98% and 2.06%, respectively, during June 2026.

articles.title: Oil rises to $86 after US restores Iran blockade, threatens strikes on energy targets
articles.description: Trump’s restoration of naval blockade and fresh strikes in response to attacks on ships in Strait of Hormuz caused oil prices to hit a four-week high. Brent rose 1.72% and WTI surged 1.4%. US Central Command launched operation to degrade Iranian capabilities, with Trump threatening to strike energy targets.

articles.title: Oil prices rise as hostilities worsen in West Asia
articles.description: Oil prices surge as U.S.-Iran tensions escalate, with Brent reaching $85.72 and WTI at $79.98 per barrel.

articles.title: Rupee rises 5 paise to 96.11 against U.S. dollar in early trade
articles.description: Rupee gains 5 paise to 96.11 against the U.S. dollar amid geopolitical tensions and rising crude oil prices.

articles.title: Downstream Risks From Trump’s War With Iran
articles.description: We Are Sleepwalking into a Global Collapse The mainstream media obsesses over oil prices. Every time a barrel jumps a few dollars, the pundits wring their hands. But they are missing the real story — the one that will crash civilization long before a gas pump runs dry. What I see, from my years tracking […]

articles.title: UP Shocker: Man's Hands Chopped Off With Axe After Dispute At Mahoba Petrol Pump - VIDEO
articles.description: A 28-year-old man allegedly had both hands chopped off with an axe after an argument at a petrol pump in Uttar Pradesh

articles.title: Markets Rally as Inflation Eases: AI Stocks in the Spotlight
articles.description: Stocks surged on Wednesday following a surprise slowdown in U.S. inflation, reducing expectations for interest rate hikes. AI stocks showed volatility, reflecting market uncertainty. European markets saw mixed futures performance, while Wall Street banks enjoyed stellar earnings. Meanwhile, China's economic growth slowed, and oil prices stabilized amidst geopolitical tensions.

articles.title: Oil prices rise as Trump threatens further strikes on Iran
articles.description: US resumes blockade on the Islamic Republic’s shipping through the Strait of Hormuz

articles.title: China's Electric Taxi Revolution: A New Buffer Against Oil Shocks
articles.description: China's transport structure sees a significant rise in electric taxis and ridesharing usage. As oil prices climb, these electric options provide a cheaper alternative, reducing China's oil dependency. With 50% of taxis now electric, gasoline demand has dropped, positioning China against global oil price fluctuations.

articles.title: Oil rises to $86 after US restores Iran blockade, threatens strikes on energy targets
articles.description: On Tuesday, oil prices hit a four-week high, rising 2%, as attacks deepened a supply crisis in the Strait of Hormuz -- a strategic water channel that aided the transport of one-fifth of global energy supplies during the pre-war period.
